basic_details.job_title: IISER Mohali Non Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 40 Attendant, Junior Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Superintending Engineer, Deputy Registrar, Deputy Librarian, Principal Technical Officer (Gr-II)(Lab), Senior Technical Officer (IT), Assistant Executive Engineer (Civil/Electrical), Senior Superintendent, Library Superintendent, Senior Technical Assistant, Physical Education Instructor, Counsellor, Nurse, Junior Engineer (Civil/Electrical), Junior Translator (Rajbhasha), Pharmacist, Junior Technical Assistant, Junior Office Assistant (MS) – Administration, Junior Office Assistant (MS) – Accounts, Attendant
basic_details.department: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research, Mohali (Ministry of Education, Govt. of India)
basic_details.total_vacancies: 40 (SC-04, OBC-NCL-04, EWS-02, UR-30; including PwBD and ESM horizontal reservations)
basic_details.short_information: IISER Mohali Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026: Get the latest IISER Mohali recruitment notification 2026 for 40 Non-Faculty (Non-Teaching) posts across Group A, Group B, and Group C categories under the Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Mohali, an Institute of National Importance under the Ministry of Education, Government of India. The last date to apply online is 15th June 2026. Find IISER Mohali vacancies on the official website www.iisermohali.ac.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming IISER Mohali Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienc

important_dates.age / qualification / experience calcula: 15/06/2026 (last date of receipt of online application)
important_dates.scheme of examination / syllabus: To be announced at a later date on IISER Mohali website
important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated via registered email and IISER Mohali website

application_fee.sc_fee: Exempted from payment of application fee
application_fee.female_fee: Exempted from payment of application fee
application_fee.details: The application fee must be paid online at the time of submission. Candidates applying for more than one post need to pay the application fee separately for each post. In case of cancellation of a post, GST will not be refunded.

age_limit.age_relaxation: Only the highest applicable relaxation shall apply - no cumulative relaxation
age_limit.details: Age limit shall be determined as on the last date for receipt of online applications (15/06/2026). Age relaxation in upper age limit will be as per Government of India norms. Candidates claiming reservation or age relaxation must attach supporting certificates. For Institute's own employees, there is no upper age limit, subject to at least one year of service remaining till superannuation on the last date of application submission. OBC-NCL certificate must be issued within 2 years of the last date of receipt of applications. EWS certificate must be issued for Financial Year 2025-26.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education/Sports Sciences with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade with 3 years of relevant full-time experience after Bachelor's Degree
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of application (15/06/2026). All qualifications must be from recognized Universities/Institutions only. Mere possession of minimum essential qualifications does not entitle candidates to be called for written test/skill test/interview. Candidates should furnish all qualifications and experience over and above the minimum prescribed along with documentary evidence. The Institute reserves the right to relax experience for persons with a brilliant academic career or specialized skills in exceptional cases. | Post-wise Educational Qualification & Experience

salary_details.pay_scale: As per 7th CPC Pay Matrix - Level 1 to Level 13 depending on post

selection_process: Stage 1 Submission of online application forms before the last date
Stage 2 Evaluation of application forms by the Scrutiny Committee; remarks published on IISER Mohali website
Stage 3 Representation(s) by applicants (if any) w.r.t. Scrutiny Committee remarks - evaluation of representations by Scrutiny Committee
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only at erp.iisermohali.ac.in. Applications received in hard copy format or any other mode will be summarily rejected. The last date is 15/06/2026 up to 05:00 PM. Candidates are advised to submit well before the closing date to avoid connectivity issues due to heavy load on the website. Once submitted, the application cannot be withdrawn under any circumstances and no editing will be allowed. All correspondence including admit cards will be sent to the registered email ID only - no hard copy letters will be sent.

Candidates serving in Central Government / State Government / Semi-Government / PSUs / Autonomous Bodies must upload the NOC/Forwarding Letter (Annexure-A) and Experience Certificate (Annexure-B) from their current employer before the last date of application, or submit by email to [email protected] before the date of written exam/interview.
Documents to be Produced at Written Test / Skill Test / Interview:
Original documents of all educational qualifications with mark sheets
important_instructions: The applicant must be a citizen of India. All posts are regular and permanent (except Lien vacancies). Selected candidates will be covered under the National Pension System (NPS). Candidates must satisfy themselves of the suitability for the position before applying - minimum essential qualifications are compulsory regardless of higher qualifications held. CGPA to percentage conversion will be done as per formula of the degree-awarding institution. OBC-NCL certificate must have been issued within 2 years of the last date of application and a self-declaration (Annexure-I) must also be submitted. EWS certificate must be valid for Financial Year 2025-26 and clearly state the same. If caste/category certificate is in a language other than Hindi or English, a certified translation must be produced at the time of interview/document verification. Candidates must disclose details of any close relatives employed at IISER Mohali, and any penalties/inquiry against them in the application. Canvassing in any form or bringing political or any other influence will be treated as disqualification. Candidates applying for more than one post must pay the application fee separately for each post. No hard copy/postal applications will be entertained - online mode only. Once submitted, the application cannot be edited or withdrawn under any circumstances. All correspondence will be made via registered email only - no separate hard copy letters will be sent. Candidates selected for Group A post interviews are eligible for travel reimbursement (AC II Tier by rail; air fare as per slab with authorized travel agent tickets only). Any corrigendum/addendum shall be published only on the Institute website. Candidates are advised to visit www.iisermohali.ac.in regularly. Any legal dispute arising out of this advertisement shall be subject to jurisdiction of the Hon'ble Punjab and Haryana High Court, Chandigarh only. In case of ambiguity between Hindi and English versions of the advertisement, the English version shall prevail. All decisions of the Competent Authority, IISER Mohali regarding eligibility, acceptance/rejection, selection, and related matters are final and binding.
